A practical guide to using Claude Code, Anthropic’s agentic coding assistant, effectively in real-world development workflows. * [`/custom-init`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/custom-init.md). * [`/help-commands`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/help-commands.md). * [`/commit`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/commit.md). Uses standardized commit templates from [`.gitmessage`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.gitmessage) and [`.github/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.github/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md). * [`/issue`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/issue.md). Integrates with GitHub PR templates from [`.github/pull_request_template.md`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.github/pull_request_template.md). * [`/reviewpr`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/reviewpr.md). * [`/test`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/commands/test.md). * [`general-purpose`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-purpose.md). * [`general-solution-architect`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-solution-architect.md). * [`general-technical-writer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-technical-writer.md). * [`general-fullstack-developer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-fullstack-developer.md). * [`general-backend-developer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-backend-developer.md). * [`general-frontend-developer`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-frontend-developer.md). * [`general-qa`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-qa.md). * [`general-code-quality-debugger`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-code-quality-debugger.md). * [`general-technical-project-lead`](https://github.com/awattar/claude-code-best-practices/blob/main/.claude/agents/general-technical-project-lead.md). * [`Best Practices for Agentic Coding`](https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/claude-code-best-practices). title: 💻 Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work. If you’re ready to move beyond the “ask and pray” approach to something that actually works consistently, here’s what I’ve learned about making Claude Code genuinely useful. But the real power comes from asking Claude to make a plan before coding and explicitly telling it not to code until you’ve confirmed that its plan looks good. The biggest mental shift for me was stopping thinking of Claude Code as a tool and starting to think of it as a junior developer who’s incredibly fast but needs good direction. After implementing these practices consistently, my Claude Code sessions became dramatically more predictable and useful. Plan first, think appropriately hard, collaborate actively, and teach Claude about your specific context through .claude files. ## I Stopped Vibe Coding and Started “Prompt Contracts” — Claude Code Went From Gambling to Shipping. ### Anthropic just launched their Claude Code in Action course, and I’ve just passed — how about you?

title: 💻 Agentic Coding Best Practices with Claude Code - Tessl
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Back to articlesAgentic Coding Best Practices with Claude Code. # Agentic Coding Best Practices with Claude Code. We had been used to either going to ChatGPT or Claude to chat about code, or to open our IDEs to be — well integrated — with our codebase. With Claude Code we have something new, yet old… a terminal based solution that lets you chat and see code changes that you can accept or reject and refine. Anthropic have kindly shared their Claude Code: Best practices for agentic coding, which is a fantastic resource for understanding how best to work with an LLM for generating code (much more practical and useful than OpenAI’s practical guide to building agents resource!). Having used Claude Code and other tools for some time, I am finding workflows that work for me. ### Configuring Claude Code. 20 Jun 2025### Unlocking Claude Code: Can Spec-Driven Development Elevate Your Workflow? ### Configuring Claude Code. 20 Jun 2025### Unlocking Claude Code: Can Spec-Driven Development Elevate Your Workflow?

title: 💻 [PDF] How Anthropic teams use Claude Code
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# </> Anthropic's internal teams are transforming their workflows with Claude Code, enabling developers and non-technical staff to tackle complex projects, automate tasks, and bridge skill gaps that previously limited their productivity. They use Claude Code for automating routine data engineering tasks, troubleshooting complex infrastructureissues,and creating documented workflows for technical and non-technical team members to access and manipulate data independently. When working with unfamiliar codebases (like the monorepo or API side), the team uses Claude Code to quickly understand how systems work. Claude Code enables these teams to build production-quality analytics dashboards without becoming full-stack developers. The team uses Claude Code as their "first stop" for any task, asking it to identify which files to examine for bug fixes, feature development, or analysis. As a non-technical team of one, they use Claude Code to automate repetitive marketing tasks and create agentic workflows that would traditionally require significant engineering resources.

title: 💻 Batch Documentation Operations: Claude Code Skill for Bulk Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Discover MCP servers that connect MCP clients like Claude and Cursor to your favorite tools. Browse the MCP Market to get started. #### Browse. #### Rankings. # Batch Documentation Operations. Manages batch operations on multiple documentation files using pattern matching and parallel execution. Acts as a high-level director for managing large sets of documentation. This skill efficiently handles batch operations like writing, validating, and auditing across numerous files identified by wildcard patterns. It orchestrates tasks by delegating to a single-document manager, executing them in parallel for speed while using file locking to prevent conflicts. Safety is paramount, with built-in previews and user confirmation for destructive actions, comprehensive progress reporting, and graceful handling of partial failures. ## Key Features. ## Use Cases. `npx skillfish add fractary/claude-plugins docs-director-skill`. For use in Claude.ai and ChatGPT. ### Related MCPs.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format text. claude -p "Process this large dataset" --output-format stream-json`. claude -p "Analyze this code" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format json | jq '.usage'`. session_id=$(claude -p "Start review" --output-format json \. claude -p "Continue the review" --resume "$session_id"`. claude -p "Review the code" \. - claude -p "Analyze maintainability issues" --output-format json. - claude -p "Check for performance bottlenecks" --output-format json. Claude Code's batch processing is built on two pillars: `/batch` and headless mode (`claude -p`). Claude Code v2.1.63 Release Notes — `/batch` and `/simplify` were introduced in this version.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing - Claude API Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Message Batches API. The Message Batches API is a powerful, cost-effective way to asynchronously process large volumes of Messages requests. ## How the Message Batches API works. When you send a request to the Message Batches API:. Any request that you can make to the Messages API can be included in a batch. ## How to use the Message Batches API. **Test your batch requests with the Messages API**. Validation of the `params` object for each message request is performed asynchronously, and validation errors are returned when processing of the entire batch has ended. echo "Batch $MESSAGE_BATCH_ID is still processing...". Once batch processing has ended, each Messages request in the batch has a result. `{"custom_id":"my-second-request","result":{"type":"succeeded","message":{"id":"msg_014VwiXbi91y3JMjcpyGBHX5","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hello again! {"custom_id":"my-first-request","result":{"type":"succeeded","message":{"id":"msg_01FqfsLoHwgeFbguDgpz48m7","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hello! curl --request POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages/batches/$MESSAGE_BATCH_ID/cancel \. The Message Batches API supports prompt caching, allowing you to potentially reduce costs and processing time for batch requests. ### Can I use the Message Batches API with other API features? ### Can I use prompt caching in the Message Batches API?

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing with Message Batches API
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch processing with Message Batches API. # Batch Processing with Message Batches API. Message Batches allow you to process large volumes of Messages requests asynchronously and cost-effectively. Let's start with a simple example that demonstrates creating and monitoring a batch of message requests. response = client.beta.messages.batches.create(requests=batch_requests). print(f"Batch ID: {response.id}"). Now let's monitor the batch processing status:. print(f" Succeeded: {batch_result.request_counts.succeeded}"). print(f" Errored: {batch_result.request_counts.errored}"). print(f" Processing: {batch_result.request_counts.processing}"). print(f" Canceled: {batch_result.request_counts.canceled}"). print(f" Expired: {batch_result.request_counts.expired}")`. Once the batch is complete, we can retrieve and process the results:. print(f"\nBatch {batch.id} Summary:"). print(f"Status: {batch.processing_status}"). print(f"Created: {batch.created_at}"). print(f"Ended: {batch.ended_at}"). print(f"Expires: {batch.expires_at}"). for result in client.beta.messages.batches.results(batch_id):. print(f"Content: {result.result.message.content[0].text[:200]}..."). ## Example 2: Advanced Batch Processing for Different Message Types. This example demonstrates more advanced usage, including error handling and processing different types of requests in a single batch including a simple message, a message with a system prompt, a multi-turn message, and a message with an image. response = client.beta.messages.batches.create(requests=batch_requests). print(f"Error creating batch: {e}"). print(f"Complex batch ID: {complex_batch_id}")`.
